payload.title: UX/AX/SX of Agentic Streams
payload.description: Exploration of the interaction paradigms for agentic event logs: forking, joining, annotating, tagging, 'choose your own adventure', time travel, and refining based on new information.

payload.title: Software 1.0 to 2.0 Classical Computing Mapping
payload.description: Mapping classical computing concepts (CPU, RAM, OS, syscalls, stdin) to their Software 2.0 equivalents (Neural Nets, Context Windows, Agents, Skills, Prompts).

payload.title: Markdown as a DAG / Graph DB
payload.description: Treating markdown files not as flat text, but as a directed acyclic graph (DAG) with a DOM-like structure, semantic line indexing, and hyperlinked graph database capabilities.
